title: chore(deps): update module golang.org/x/net to v0.33.0 [security]
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| golang.org/x/net | `v0.30.0` -> `v0.33.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/golang.org%2fx%2fnet/v0.33.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/golang.org%2fx%2fnet/v0.33.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/golang.org%2fx%2fnet/v0.30.0/v0.33.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/golang.org%2fx%2fnet/v0.30.0/v0.33.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

### GitHub Vulnerability Alerts

#### [CVE-2024-45338](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-45338)

An attacker can craft an input to the Parse functions that would be processed non-linearly with respect to its length, resulting in extremely slow parsing. This could cause a denial of service.
